    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::onInterval"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::decodeHeaders"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::decodeData"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::decodeTrailers"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::isHealthCheckSucceeded"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::onRpcComplete"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::logHealthCheckStatus"}
  ],
  "text": "The gRPC health check protocol compliance in envoyproxy/envoy is primarily implemented in two files:\n\n1. `source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.h` - Header declaring:\n   - `GrpcHealthCheckerFactory`: Factory for creating gRPC health checkers, registered under 'envoy.health_checkers.grpc'\n   - `GrpcHealthCheckerImpl`: Main gRPC health checker class implementing the grpc.health.v1.Health service client\n   - `GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession`: Inner class handling per-host health check sessions, including decoding HealthCheckResponse messages\n   - `ProdGrpcHealthCheckerImpl`: Production implementation that creates real HTTP/2 codec clients\n\n2. `source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc` - Implementation containing:\n   - Constructor for `GrpcHealthCheckerImpl` that looks up the `grpc.health.v1.Health.Check` method descriptor and configures service_name from GrpcHealthCheck config\n   - `onInterval()`: Sends `grpc::health::v1::HealthCheckRequest` to the upstream, optionally setting the `service` field from config\n   - `decodeHeaders()`: Handles HTTP/2 response headers; maps non-200 HTTP status to gRPC status via `Grpc::Utility::httpToGrpcStatus()`\n   - `decodeData()`: Parses the `grpc::health::v1::HealthCheckResponse` protobuf from the gRPC wire frame\n   - `decodeTrailers()`: Extracts the final gRPC status from trailers\n   - `isHealthCheckSucceeded()`: Maps `HealthCheckResponse::SERVING` status to health check success; any other status (NOT_SERVING, UNKNOWN, SERVICE_UNKNOWN) or non-OK gRPC status is treated as failure\n   - `onRpcComplete()`: Calls `handleSuccess()` or `handleFailure()` based on `isHealthCheckSucceeded()`\n   - `logHealthCheckStatus()`: Logs all four `HealthCheckResponse` status values (SERVING, NOT_SERVING, UNKNOWN, SERVICE_UNKNOWN)\n\nSupporting infrastructure from `source/common/upstream/health_checker_impl.cc` and `source/extensions/health_checkers/common/health_checker_base_impl.cc` provides the `HealthCheckerImplBase` and `ActiveHealthCheckSession` base classes used by the gRPC health checker.\n\nThe proto definitions for `grpc.health.v1.Health`, `HealthCheckRequest`, and `HealthCheckResponse` come from `src/proto/grpc/health/v1/health.proto` in the grpc repo (grpc/grpc), which is vendored into Envoy."
}

conversation_events.text:
# Envoy gRPC Health Check Protocol Compliance

## Your Task

Find all C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that implement gRPC health check protocol compliance: the grpc.health.v1.Health service implementation, the HealthCheckRequest handling, and the health check response status mapping.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the compliance domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2, sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367, sg-evals/go-control-plane--71637ad6, sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e.


## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
Now I have all the information needed. Let me compile the findings into the answer.

The answer has been written to `/workspace/answer.json`. Here's a summary of the findings:

## gRPC Health Check Protocol Compliance in envoyproxy/envoy

The implementation is concentrated in two primary files:

### Core Implementation Files

**`source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.h`** and **`source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc`**

Key classes and symbols:

| Symbol | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `GrpcHealthCheckerFactory` | Factory registered as `envoy.health_checkers.grpc` |
| `GrpcHealthCheckerImpl` | Main implementation; looks up `grpc.health.v1.Health.Check` method descriptor at construction |
| `GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession` | Per-host session; handles the full gRPC HTTP/2 request/response lifecycle |
| `ProdGrpcHealthCheckerImpl` | Production subclass creating real HTTP/2 codec clients |

### Protocol Compliance Details

- **HealthCheckRequest handling** (`onInterval`): Sends `grpc::health::v1::HealthCheckRequest`, optionally setting the `service` field from config
- **Response status mapping** (`isHealthCheckSucceeded`): Only `HealthCheckResponse::SERVING` → success; `NOT_SERVING`, `UNKNOWN`, `SERVICE_UNKNOWN` → failure
- **HTTP-to-gRPC status mapping** (`decodeHeaders`): Uses `Grpc::Utility::httpToGrpcStatus()` per the gRPC-over-HTTP/2 spec
- **Response parsing** (`decodeData`): Decodes `grpc::health::v1::HealthCheckResponse` from gRPC wire frames
- **Trailer handling** (`decodeTrailers`): Extracts final gRPC status from HTTP/2 trailers
- **All four status values logged** (`logHealthCheckStatus`): SERVING, NOT_SERVING, UNKNOWN, SERVICE_UNKNOWN

    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/common/health_checker_base_impl.cc"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/common/health_checker_base_impl.h"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/common/upstream/health_checker_impl.cc"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/common/upstream/health_checker_impl.h"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerFactory"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "ProdGrpcHealthCheckerImpl"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.h", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.h", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerFactory"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.h", "symbol": "ProdGrpcHealthCheckerImpl"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::onInterval"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::decodeHeaders"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::decodeData"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::decodeTrailers"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::isHealthCheckSucceeded"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::onRpcComplete"},
    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc", "symbol": "GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession::logHealthCheckStatus"}
  ],
  "text": "The gRPC health check protocol compliance in envoyproxy/envoy is primarily implemented in two files:\n\n1. `source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.h` - Header declaring:\n   - `GrpcHealthCheckerFactory`: Factory for creating gRPC health checkers, registered under 'envoy.health_checkers.grpc'\n   - `GrpcHealthCheckerImpl`: Main gRPC health checker class implementing the grpc.health.v1.Health service client\n   - `GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession`: Inner class handling per-host health check sessions, including decoding HealthCheckResponse messages\n   - `ProdGrpcHealthCheckerImpl`: Production implementation that creates real HTTP/2 codec clients\n\n2. `source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc` - Implementation containing:\n   - Constructor for `GrpcHealthCheckerImpl` that looks up the `grpc.health.v1.Health.Check` method descriptor and configures service_name from GrpcHealthCheck config\n   - `onInterval()`: Sends `grpc::health::v1::HealthCheckRequest` to the upstream, optionally setting the `service` field from config\n   - `decodeHeaders()`: Handles HTTP/2 response headers; maps non-200 HTTP status to gRPC status via `Grpc::Utility::httpToGrpcStatus()`\n   - `decodeData()`: Parses the `grpc::health::v1::HealthCheckResponse` protobuf from the gRPC wire frame\n   - `decodeTrailers()`: Extracts the final gRPC status from trailers\n   - `isHealthCheckSucceeded()`: Maps `HealthCheckResponse::SERVING` status to health check success; any other status (NOT_SERVING, UNKNOWN, SERVICE_UNKNOWN) or non-OK gRPC status is treated as failure\n   - `onRpcComplete()`: Calls `handleSuccess()` or `handleFailure()` based on `isHealthCheckSucceeded()`\n   - `logHealthCheckStatus()`: Logs all four `HealthCheckResponse` status values (SERVING, NOT_SERVING, UNKNOWN, SERVICE_UNKNOWN)\n\nSupporting infrastructure from `source/common/upstream/health_checker_impl.cc` and `source/extensions/health_checkers/common/health_checker_base_impl.cc` provides the `HealthCheckerImplBase` and `ActiveHealthCheckSession` base classes used by the gRPC health checker.\n\nThe proto definitions for `grpc.health.v1.Health`, `HealthCheckRequest`, and `HealthCheckResponse` come from `src/proto/grpc/health/v1/health.proto` in the grpc repo (grpc/grpc), which is vendored into Envoy."
}

  "text": "The gRPC health check protocol compliance in envoyproxy/envoy is primarily implemented in two files:\n\n1. `source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.h` - Header declaring:\n   - `GrpcHealthCheckerFactory`: Factory for creating gRPC health checkers, registered under 'envoy.health_checkers.grpc'\n   - `GrpcHealthCheckerImpl`: Main gRPC health checker class implementing the grpc.health.v1.Health service client\n   - `GrpcHealthCheckerImpl::GrpcActiveHealthCheckSession`: Inner class handling per-host health check sessions, including decoding HealthCheckResponse messages\n   - `ProdGrpcHealthCheckerImpl`: Production implementation that creates real HTTP/2 codec clients\n\n2. `source/extensions/health_checkers/grpc/health_checker_impl.cc` - Implementation containing:\n   - Constructor for `GrpcHealthCheckerImpl` that looks up the `grpc.health.v1.Health.Check` method descriptor and configures service_name from GrpcHealthCheck config\n   - `onInterval()`: Sends `grpc::health::v1::HealthCheckRequest` to the upstream, optionally setting the `service` field from config\n   - `decodeHeaders()`: Handles HTTP/2 response headers; maps non-200 HTTP status to gRPC status via `Grpc::Utility::httpToGrpcStatus()`\n   - `decodeData()`: Parses the `grpc::health::v1::HealthCheckResponse` protobuf from the gRPC wire frame\n   - `decodeTrailers()`: Extracts the final gRPC status from trailers\n   - `isHealthCheckSucceeded()`: Maps `HealthCheckResponse::SERVING` status to health check success; any other status (NOT_SERVING, UNKNOWN, SERVICE_UNKNOWN) or non-OK gRPC status is treated as failure\n   - `onRpcComplete()`: Calls `handleSuccess()` or `handleFailure()` based on `isHealthCheckSucceeded()`\n   - `logHealthCheckStatus()`: Logs all four `HealthCheckResponse` status values (SERVING, NOT_SERVING, UNKNOWN, SERVICE_UNKNOWN)\n\nSupporting infrastructure from `source/common/upstream/health_checker_impl.cc` and `source/extensions/health_checkers/common/health_checker_base_impl.cc` provides the `HealthCheckerImplBase` and `ActiveHealthCheckSession` base classes used by the gRPC health checker.\n\nThe proto definitions for `grpc.health.v1.Health`, `HealthCheckRequest`, and `HealthCheckResponse` come from `src/proto/grpc/health/v1/health.proto` in the grpc repo (grpc/grpc), which is vendored into Envoy."
